events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the 3-way traveler miswire lets a normal light switch de-energize emergency egress lighting, violating the unswitched/automatic-control requirement in NEC 700.12/700.16 and the continuous-illumination requirement in NFPA 101 7.9. Result is a **fail**, high risk, with corrective rewiring and a loss-of-normal-power retest required before reinspection.
